name: BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - BTG Global REITS Fondo de Inversion
summary: BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos - BTG Global REITS Fondo de Inversion is a global REITs (Real Estate Investment Trusts) investment fund. It is managed by BTG Pactual Chile S.A. Administradora General De Fondos and aims to generate returns through investments in REITs around the world.
